title: Yun Quezi
content:
Yun Quezi
 is a member of the 
Forsaken Immortal Clan
; he is the current head of its branch on 
Planet Suzaku
.

Contents

1

Appearance

2

Background

3

History

4

Trivia

Appearance
[
]

This person was wearing a red robe, his face was old, he gave off an ancient aura, and a powerful pressure could be felt from him.

Background
[
]

In the past, he was a candidate for inheriting the title of Suzaku but he lost to 
Zhu Quezi
.

He chose four candidates for the next Suzaku; namely

Red Butterfly

Zi Xin

Zhou Wutai

Wang Lin
[
1
]

History
[
]

He chose 
Wang Lin
 as one of the four candidates for inheriting the title of next Suzaku. He gave him a straw hat that conceals the wearer's presence. This hat allowed Wang Lin experience the domains of 
Soul Formation
 cultivators which helped him breakthrough to Soul Formation.

After Wang Lin returned to 
Planet Suzaku
 during the war between the 
Allheaven Star System
 and the 
Alliance Star System
, Yun Quezi followed him to the Immortal Graveyard. There, they reached the 17th floor when 
Huang Long
 stopped them from proceeding further.

When Wang Lin returned to Suzaku after being known as the Lord of the Sealed Realm, Zhou Wutai stated that Yun Quezi had passed away as his lifespan had reached its end.

↑

430

Trivia
[
]

He was appointed as the next Suzaku by 
Qian Pinghai
, the 13th Suzaku. The title was stolen by 
Zhuque Zi
. After he lost some kind of wager and he was sentences to a thousand years of exile.

There is some discussion as to his real cultivation level. Either he has a 10-Leaf cultivation or he is Middle stage Ascendant. He most likely has a normal Qi cultivation because he used to be the disciple of the Suzaku and it would've been hard to hide it from of him. He also is one of the only 2 members of the 
Forsaken Immortal Clan
 that have a domain with 
Mei Ji
.
